case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. LORETTA BASCO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BASCO, LORETTA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-08-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2011, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
